answers.response: The UPSC Civil Services Examination (CSE) is conducted in three stages: Prelims (Objective), Mains (Descriptive), and Interview. Focus on NCERTs from class 6-12, The Hindu for current affairs, and standard books like Laxmikanth for Polity. (Offline Mode Active)
SSC exams focus heavily on Quantitative Aptitude, English Comprehension, Reasoning, and General Awareness. Practice previous year papers and focus on advanced math formulas. (Offline Mode Active)
